phases.summary: Created the H-Log phase registry and initial step documents for the blog and automated publishing roadmap.

Steps 0-5 completed: DB content contract, published-only route boundary, Markdown/HTML integrity, safe public rendering, public HTTPS source links, index surface, and non-routed admin workflow contract.
Steps 0-4 completed: OCI runtime topology, Compose service boundary, hardened local Nginx reverse proxy, PostgreSQL backup/restore runbook, and deploy smoke/rollback runbook.

Steps 0-3 completed: publish state transitions, required vs retryable job failure handling, operational audit logging, correction version history, unpublish/retract public removal, and terminal-status republish blocking are tested. Actual OCI server setup remains approval-required before search work.
Approval-required actual OCI host setup phase. Do not run ssh oci, firewall/security list changes, Docker Compose restart, or Nginx production changes until the user explicitly approves this phase.
